title: Pipeline coverage early-warning email
problem: Marketing and GTM leaders only learn about pipeline coverage gaps at the weekly forecast review — by then the window to act has closed. We want a daily digest that flags any segment slipping below 3x coverage with the responsible AE and the at-risk amount.

title: Renewal Risk Dashboard
problem: The renewal team has no proactive view of accounts at risk before the 90-day window. By the time they react, the customer has already made up their mind.
solutionDescription: Building a renewal risk dashboard that scores accounts on a 0–100 risk scale based on usage telemetry, support tickets, NPS, and contract proximity. CSM-facing view shows top 20 at-risk accounts with drill-down into signals.

title: AR Collections Prioritization Engine
problem: The Finance AR team was working collections with no systematic prioritization. High-value overdue accounts were treated the same as low-value ones, and the team had no data on which outreach method worked best.
solutionDescription: Building a collections scoring model that ranks overdue accounts by ARR, days past due, historical pay behavior, and customer health score. Daily priority queue surfaced in a C3 dashboard. A/B tested outreach cadences are tracked for efficacy.

title: Unified GTM Health Dashboard
problem: Marketing and Customer Success leaders had no shared view of GTM health: pipeline coverage, renewal risk, and segment-level attainment lived in disconnected dashboards. Teams were making decisions on stale or partial data.
solutionDescription: Built a unified GTM health dashboard joining Salesforce pipeline data, CSM health scores, and Marketing attribution into a single C3 entity model. Daily refresh, role-based views (CRO, CMO, VP CS), and drill-down to account level.

title: Automated Headcount Variance Report
problem: The FP&A team spent 6–8 hours every month manually reconciling headcount data across Workday, Adaptive, and internal spreadsheets. Discrepancies went undetected until close, causing last-minute reforecasts.
solutionDescription: Built a C3 AI pipeline that pulls from Workday and Adaptive APIs on a nightly schedule, computes variance by department and cost center, and surfaces a self-refreshing dashboard. Threshold alerts flag anomalies >2% before month-end close.

title: Deal Desk Approval Automation
problem: Sales Ops was bottlenecking 30+ deals per quarter waiting for manual Deal Desk approvals via email chains. Average approval latency was 4.2 days, delaying close and degrading rep satisfaction.
solutionDescription: Implemented a rules-based approval router that ingests deal attributes from Salesforce, runs them through a tiered policy engine, and either auto-approves low-risk deals or routes complex deals to the right approver with structured context. Built-in escalation paths and SLA timers.

title: Quota Attainment Digest
problem: Sales leadership had no single view of real-time quota attainment by rep, segment, and region. The weekly deck took a quota analyst 5 hours to build from three disconnected exports.
solutionDescription: Built a weekly auto-generated digest that pulls Salesforce opportunity data, applies quota bookings logic, and emails a formatted summary to each regional VP every Monday at 7am. Includes sparklines, segment drill-downs, and YTD trend.

title: CS Health Score Automation
problem: Customer Success Managers were manually computing health scores for 200+ accounts in a shared spreadsheet. Updates happened monthly at best, creating blind spots for at-risk accounts.
solutionDescription: Automated health score computation using C3 AI time-series + entity types. Pulls usage telemetry, support ticket volume, NPS data, and contract renewal date proximity. Scores refresh daily. Escalation alerts are routed to the owning CSM via Slack.

title: Eng Incident Cost Estimator
problem: Engineering leadership had no way to quantify the cost of incidents — downtime was tracked in PagerDuty, but the business impact (eng hours, customer ARR at risk, support load) was never rolled up.
solutionDescription: Built an incident cost model that joins PagerDuty data with ARR exposure, support ticket surge metrics, and eng time estimates. Generates a cost report for every P1/P2 within 48 hours of resolution.
